rationale: In the citing article, Griskevicius et al. (2009) is cited only once in a grouped list of examples showing that evolutionary theorizing has appeared in marketing research. The paper is not discussed separately, and its specific findings, mechanisms, or methods are not used to build the article's conceptual framework beyond this broad background point. Because the citation functions as a general illustrative reference rather than a meaningful building block in the argument, its role is mention-level.
